B D F I M N R T V X 

B

baseUri() - Method in class ie.isde.metadata.Dataset
 
baseUri() - Method in interface ie.isde.metadata.IDataset
Returns the base URI for the dataset, particularly useful when building Linked Data representations of the dataset's metadata

D

Dataset - Class in ie.isde.metadata
Implements the Dataset Interface to create objects of the Dataset type to represent metadata objects of this type within the Irish Spatial Data Exchange.
Dataset() - Constructor for class ie.isde.metadata.Dataset
 

F

fromISO(String) - Method in class ie.isde.metadata.Dataset
 
fromISO(String) - Method in interface ie.isde.metadata.IDataset
Populates an object's attributes from an ISO XML record

I

IDataset - Interface in ie.isde.metadata
Represents the metadata object describing a dataset in the Irish Spatial Data Exchange
ie.isde.exceptions - package ie.isde.exceptions
Provides custom Exceptions for more explicit error handling in Irish Spatial Data Exchange software tools.
ie.isde.metadata - package ie.isde.metadata
Represents the base metadata objects in use across the Irish Spatial Data Exchange
ie.isde.metadata.translator - package ie.isde.metadata.translator
 
IsoXmlQueries - Enum in ie.isde.metadata
Enumerates the XPath queries used to extract the various metadata attributes used in a constructing a Dataset object
ITranslator - Interface in ie.isde.metadata.translator
IsoBase provides an interface to specify the public facing class for translating ISO19115/19139 metadata to other representations.

M

main(String[]) - Static method in class ie.isde.metadata.translator.Translator
Translates an ISO XML record from the Irish Spatial Data Exchange to either World Wide Web Consortium (W3C) Data Catalog Vocabulary (DCAT) profile as Terse Triple Language (TTL) or Schema.org as a JSON object conforming to the JSON-LD Linked Data profile.
metadataAbstract() - Method in class ie.isde.metadata.Dataset
 
metadataAbstract() - Method in interface ie.isde.metadata.IDataset
Get the abstract (describing the who, what, when, where and why) of the dataset

N

NotEnoughInputsException - Class in ie.isde.exceptions
 
NotEnoughInputsException() - Constructor for class ie.isde.exceptions.NotEnoughInputsException
 
ns() - Method in enum ie.isde.metadata.translator.RDFNamespaces
Get the preferred namespace prefix for the vocabulary
nsURI() - Method in enum ie.isde.metadata.translator.RDFNamespaces
Get the preferred namespace URI for the vocabulary

R

RDFNamespaces - Enum in ie.isde.metadata.translator
Enumerates the RDF namespaces required for the translated Irish Spatial Data Exchange metadata

T

title() - Method in class ie.isde.metadata.Dataset
 
title() - Method in interface ie.isde.metadata.IDataset
Returns the title of the dataset represented by the metadata object
toDCAT() - Method in interface ie.isde.metadata.translator.ITranslator
Translates the Irish Spatial Data Exchange metadata record supplied in ISO19115/19139 XML to a W3C Data Catalog Vocabulary representation
toDCAT() - Method in class ie.isde.metadata.translator.Translator
 
TooManyInputsException - Class in ie.isde.exceptions
 
TooManyInputsException() - Constructor for class ie.isde.exceptions.TooManyInputsException
 
toSchemaOrg() - Method in interface ie.isde.metadata.translator.ITranslator
Translates the Irish Spatial Data Exchange metadata record supplied in ISO19115/19139 XML to a Schema.org representation
toSchemaOrg() - Method in class ie.isde.metadata.translator.Translator
 
Translator - Class in ie.isde.metadata.translator
This class facilitates different serializations of Irish Spatial Data Exchange metadata.
Translator(String) - Constructor for class ie.isde.metadata.translator.Translator
 

V

valueOf(String) - Static method in enum ie.isde.metadata.IsoXmlQueries
Returns the enum constant of this type with the specified name.
valueOf(String) - Static method in enum ie.isde.metadata.translator.RDFNamespaces
Returns the enum constant of this type with the specified name.
values() - Static method in enum ie.isde.metadata.IsoXmlQueries
Returns an array containing the constants of this enum type, in the order they are declared.
values() - Static method in enum ie.isde.metadata.translator.RDFNamespaces
Returns an array containing the constants of this enum type, in the order they are declared.

X

xPath() - Method in enum ie.isde.metadata.IsoXmlQueries
